sectionDescription: Risk patterns flagged for a manager to review.

message.loop_breaker: {subject} tripped the loop-breaker {count} times in the last {windowMin} min.
message.phantom_turns: {subject} produced {count} phantom turns in the last {windowMin} min.
message.broadcast_spike: {subject} triggered {count} wakes in the last {windowMin} min.
message.budget_drain: {subject} consumed {share}% of other members' wake budget.
